command:
printf 'fixtures
'; find tests/fixtures -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort; printf '
web tests
'; find src/tests -maxdepth 4 -type f | sort | grep -E 'web|fixture|parity|integration' || true

if [ -e tests/fixtures/web-mode-parity-manifest.json ]; then echo manifest-exists; fi; if [ -d tests/fixtures/web-mode-parity-fixture ]; then echo fixture-dir-exists; find tests/fixtures/web-mode-parity-fixture -maxdepth 4 -type f | sort; fi; if [ -e src/tests/integration/web-mode-fixture-contract.test.ts ]; then echo test-exists; fi
grep -R "data-testid=\"workspace-project-cwd\"\|data-testid=\"sidebar-current-scope\"\|switch-root\|select project\|project switch" -n web src | head -n 200

command: find tests/fixtures/web-mode-parity-fixture -type f | sort && printf '\n---\n' && ls -1 src/tests/integration/web-mode-fixture-contract.test.ts tests/fixtures/web-mode-parity-manifest.json

python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time, os
cmd = ['node', '--import', './src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/resolve-ts.mjs', '--experimental-strip-types', '--test', 'src/tests/integration/web-mode-fixture-contract.test.ts']
start = time.time()
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, cwd='.', capture_output=True, text=True)
duration_ms = int((time.time() - start) * 1000)
print(f'EXIT_CODE={proc.returncode}')
print(f'DURATION_MS={duration_ms}')
print('--- STDOUT ---')
print(proc.stdout)
print('--- STDERR ---')
print(proc.stderr)
PY
